tools_used: CourtListener MCP opinion search and endpoint retrieval
helpful: The full petition and brief in opposition exposed the unusually strong vehicle and repetition issues.
The statpack supplied paid-petition, relist, and CVSG calibration.
CourtListener supplied the controlling pre-decision CAAF opinion.
gaps: The ranged corpus store was unreachable because DNS resolution failed, so similar resolved priors could not be retrieved.
The docket listed a reply brief, but its text was not provisioned.
notes: The failed corpus-query attempt is listed in retrieval.md; used_corpus_query is false because it returned no priors. The provisioned record and base-rate artifact were sufficient to complete the cell.
